---
id: set-write-only-reviewed
title: "Toggle the reviewed-only flag on any TM in the organization"
description: "Sets `writeOnlyReviewed` on the given TM. Unlike the main update endpoint, this accepts PROJECT-type TMs too, so org maintainers can edit this single setting from the org-level TM list without switching into project settings."
sidebar_label: "Toggle the reviewed-only flag on any TM in the organization"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: api//tolgee-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Toggle the reviewed-only flag on any TM in the organization"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v2/organizations/{organizationId}/translation-memories/{translationMemoryId}/write-only-reviewed"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Sets `writeOnlyReviewed` on the given TM. Unlike the main update endpoint, this accepts PROJECT-type TMs too, so org maintainers can edit this single setting from the org-level TM list without switching into project settings.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  {...require("./set-write-only-reviewed.ParamsDetails.json")}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./set-write-only-reviewed.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

>
